title: hyoscyamus niger var. pygmaeus
intro: Hyoscyamus niger var. pygmaeus, also known as dwarf henbane, is a variety of the henbane plant, a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, sedative, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Hyoscyamus niger var. pygmaeus include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as pain management and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
